assertions.title: SessionStore — biometricStatus state machine
assertions.reason: Focused session-store Jest coverage passed for hydrate, hydrateRestored, reset, and biometricStatus transitions; the legacy PIN token scan on session-store.ts returned no matches.

summaryLines: Legacy PIN token scan exit code: 1 (no matches)

assertions.title: useAutoLock — backgrounding locks AND tears down the agent
assertions.reason: The focused useAutoLock Jest suite passed all 9 tests, covering exactly-once lock+teardown on active→background/inactive, no double teardown on inactive→background, skip-when-locked behavior, and the static AUTO_LOCK_TIMEOUT_MS absence check.

assertions.title: No legacy PIN UI strings remain in new auth screens
assertions.reason: The contract rg scan still finds PIN/passcode strings under src/features/auth/screens/, including source comments and test assertions in biometric-setup, biometric-unavailable, and biometric-unlock files.
assertions.issues: Matches include src/features/auth/screens/biometric-setup-screen.tsx:70, biometric-unavailable-screen.tsx:11, biometric-unlock-screen.tsx:14 and multiple *.test.tsx assertions referencing PIN/passcode fallback text.

assertions.title: TypeScript + lint clean after migration
assertions.reason: Both authoritative repo validators exited 0: bun run typecheck completed without TypeScript errors and bun run lint completed without lint errors under the repo's configured rules.

assertions.title: No orphaned exports from constants/auth
assertions.reason: No src/ imports from '@/constants/auth' remain, but the removed-constants token scan still matches AUTO_LOCK_TIMEOUT_MS in src/constants/auth.ts and in src/hooks/__tests__/use-auto-lock.test.tsx.
assertions.issues: rg found AUTO_LOCK_TIMEOUT_MS at src/constants/auth.ts:2 plus references in the static contract test at src/hooks/__tests__/use-auto-lock.test.tsx:20, :204, and :215.

assertions.title: useAutoLock tears down the agent on background and inactive
assertions.reason: The focused useAutoLock Jest suite passed the teardown coverage for both background and inactive AppState changes, and verified teardown is skipped when the session is already locked.

assertions.title: After auto-lock teardown, next unlock requires a fresh biometric prompt
assertions.reason: The supporting cross-area auto-lock flow test passed: backgrounding dropped the agent and locked the session, foreground did not auto-call NativeBiometricVault.getSecret, and the explicit unlock path called biometrics again.

commandsRun.observation: PASS; session-store core coverage passed with 13/13 tests.
PASS; biometricStatus hydration matrix coverage passed with 7/7 tests.
PASS; the session store no longer contains the listed PIN-era fields/actions.
PASS; useAutoLock hook coverage passed with 9/9 tests.

commandsRun.command: bun run test -- src/__tests__/cross-area/auto-lock-flow.test.tsx -t "background drops agent + locks session; foreground does NOT auto-prompt biometrics"
commandsRun.observation: FRICTION; Jest reported 1 skipped suite / 2 skipped tests for the exact -t filter, so this run did not provide usable VAL-VAULT-021 evidence.
PASS; supporting auto-lock integration coverage passed with 2/2 tests.
FAIL; PIN/passcode strings are still present under src/features/auth/screens/.
PASS; TypeScript completed with no errors.
PASS; ESLint exited 0, reporting warnings but no errors.
PASS; no current src/ import from '@/constants/auth' was found.
FAIL; AUTO_LOCK_TIMEOUT_MS still exists under src/.

frictions.description: The exact Jest -t filter for the auto-lock flow unexpectedly produced a fully skipped run even though the named test exists in src/__tests__/cross-area/auto-lock-flow.test.tsx.
frictions.resolution: Reran the minimum supporting file without -t and used the passing full-file output as VAL-VAULT-021 evidence.

summary: Tested 7 assertions on the jest-local surface: 5 passed, 2 failed, 0 blocked. VAL-UX-040 fails because PIN/passcode strings still appear under src/features/auth/screens/, and VAL-UX-042 fails because AUTO_LOCK_TIMEOUT_MS remains in src/constants/auth.ts and a hook test. Focused session-store, useAutoLock, cross-area auto-lock, typecheck, and lint commands otherwise passed.
